description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a distinctive teal and dark blue cover, accented by cream and yellow vertical stripes and a stylized line drawing on the front. The book is bound with five visible white cord loops along the spine, giving it a hand-crafted or artistic appearance. The cover features a ribbon bookmark in a pale yellow shade, partially tucked between the pages. The pages are slightly uneven, suggesting a well-used or artisanal quality. The book's cover is matte, with no visible gloss or lamination, and the edges of the cover and pages are slightly irregular. There are no visible publisher logos or dust jacket, and the spine is decorated only by the binding cords.
description: A thick, teal and dark blue hardbound book with white cord binding, cream and yellow stripes, and a ribbon bookmark. The cover features a stylized line drawing and a matte finish.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the stylized line drawing, vertical stripes, and the ribbon bookmark, with the cord binding along the left edge.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the top, highlighting the five white cord loops along the spine and the full width of the cover's color pattern.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, with the cord binding on the right and the stylized line drawing partially visible, as well as the uneven page edges.
description_view_3: The spine is in full view, showing the five white cord loops and the dark blue color, with no text or decorative elements.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a stylized, abstract line drawing in a light color, possibly depicting a figure or animal, set against a teal background with vertical cream and yellow stripes. The illustration is minimalistic and artistic, with no detailed imagery.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark blue with five evenly spaced white cord loops running horizontally. There is no visible text or decorative pattern on the spine.
